subcodes.first_line: O Trust of God! Blessed art thou, and blessed is he that hath reared thee, and blessed is he whom God hath strengthened to show forth kindness unto thee. We beseech God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امان الله طوبی لک و لمن رباک و لمن ایده الله بالمعروف فی حقک نسئل الله ان
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @being a source of light; guidance, @knowledge; recognition of God
